2604.12700.title: MISID: A Multimodal Multi-turn Dataset for Complex Intent Recognition in Strategic Deception Games
2604.12700.paper_summary: Understanding human intent in complex multi-turn interactions remains a fundamental challenge in human-computer interaction and behavioral analysis. While existing intent recognition datasets focus mainly on single utterances or simple dialogues, real-world scenarios often involve sophisticated strategic interactions where participants must maintain complex deceptive narratives over extended periods. To address this gap, we introduce MISID, a comprehensive multimodal, multi-turn, and multi-participant benchmark for intent recognition. Sourced from high-stakes social strategy games, MISID features a fine-grained, two-tier multi-dimensional annotation scheme tailored for long-context discourse analysis and evidence-based causal tracking. Our systematic evaluation of state-of-the-art Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) on MISID reveals critical deficiencies in complex scenarios, including text-prior visual hallucination, impaired cross-modal synergy, and limited capacity in chaining causal cues. Consequently, we propose FRACTAM as a baseline framework. Using a ``Decouple-Anchor-Reason'' paradigm, FRACTAM reduces text bias by extracting pure unimodal factual representations, employs two-stage retrieval for long-range factual anchoring, and constructs explicit cross-modal evidence chains. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FRACTAM enhances mainstream models' performance in complex strategic tasks, improving hidden intent detection and inference while maintaining robust perceptual accuracy. Our dataset is available at https://naislab.cn/datasets/MISID.
2604.12700.paper_summary_zh: 理解人類在複雜多輪互動中的意圖仍然是人機互動和行為分析中的一個基本挑戰。<lb/>雖然現有的意圖識別數據集主要集中在單一發話或簡單對話上，但現實世界的場景往往涉及複雜的策略互動，其中參與者必須在長時間內維持複雜的欺騙敘事。<lb/>為了解決這一差距，我們推出了MISID，一個全面的多模態、多輪次和多參與者的意圖識別基準。<lb/>MISID源自高風險社交策略遊戲，具有精細的兩級多維註釋方案，專為長上下文話語分析和基於證據的因果追蹤而設計。<lb/>我們對最新的多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）在MISID上的系統評估揭示了在複雜場景中的關鍵缺陷，包括文本優先的視覺幻覺、跨模態協同能力受損以及在鏈接因果線索方面的能力有限。<lb/>因此，我們提出了FRACTAM作為基準框架。<lb/>使用“解耦-錨定-推理”範式，FRACTAM通過提取純粹的單模態事實表示來減少文本偏見，採用兩階段檢索進行長距離事實錨定，並構建明確的跨模態證據鏈。<lb/>大量實驗表明，FRACTAM提高了主流模型在複雜策略任務中的表現，改善了隱性意圖檢測和推理，同時保持了穩健的感知準確性。<lb/>我們的數據集可在 https://naislab.cn/datasets/MISID 獲得。
2604.12700.author: Shufang Lin et.al.
2604.12700.authors: Shufang Lin, Muyang Chen, Xiabing Zhou, Rongrong Zhang, Dayou Zhang, Fangxin Wang
